metadata.description: A self-contained rigor toolkit for researchers and research engineers.

plugins.name: research-rigor
plugins.description: Decide what to build (design-spec), find prior art (prior-art-check), run a defensible literature search (research-papers), harden decisions to convergence (convergent-review), and turn a spec into a reviewable implementation plan (implementation-plan), orchestrated end to end by project-kickoff. Ships the oracle and council critic agents. Optional, auto-detected search providers with built-in fallback.
